description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden barrel with a cylindrical body, reinforced by four wide metal hoops spaced evenly along its length. The wood staves are vertically aligned and show natural grain and some weathering, suggesting outdoor use. A thick, twisted rope is wrapped around the barrel in a crisscross pattern, looping over the top and sides, and secured at the top with a wooden knob. The barrel sits on a simple wooden stand that elevates it slightly off the ground. At one end, there is a metal spigot for dispensing liquid, indicating the barrel is designed to hold and pour contents. The overall appearance is rustic and functional, suitable for urban outdoor or semi-industrial settings.
description: A rustic wooden barrel with metal hoops, rope reinforcement, and a metal spigot, set on a wooden stand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular wooden face, metal spigot at the bottom center, and rope knots on top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full cylindrical body, four metal hoops, and the crisscrossed rope pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wooden face, no spigot, and visible metal hoops and rope on top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cylindrical body, metal hoops, and rope pattern, similar to view 1.
